case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC VS. JESSE NICHOLAS

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NICHOLAS, JESSE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-29-2012
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-26-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-26-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
